debug_info.goal:
inst✝ : Arch
x✝ : SystemState
state✝ : SystemState := x✝
rmwWrites : List Request := ⋯
state : SystemState
rmwWrite previousWrite : Request
otherWrites : List Request := ⋯
failedWriteBetween : Bool := ⋯
failedOtherRMW : Bool := ⋯
failed : Bool := ⋯
rmwWrite' : Request := ⋯
removedWrites : List Request := ⋯
removed' : List Request := ⋯
requestsRemoved : RequestArray := ⋯
requests' : RequestArray := ⋯
⊢ ∀ (id : RequestId), id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' → id ∈ reqIds requests'

failed_attempts:
by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [removed', requests', reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 have : id ∈ List.map Request.id removedWrites := by
                   have hsub : List.map Request.id removed' ⊆ List.map Request.id (removedWrites ++ state.removed) := by
                     intro i hi
                     exact List.mem_of_mem_qsort (l := removedWrites ++ state.removed) (lt := (fun r₁ r₂ => Nat.ble r₁.id r₂.id)) hi
                   exact hsub hid
                 have : id ∉ reqIds requestsRemoved := by
                   induction removedWrites with
                   | nil =>
                     simpa [requestsRemoved] using (List.not_mem_nil id)
                   | cons r rs ih =>
                     have hr : r.id ∉ reqIds (requestsRemoved := rs.foldl (fun arr req => arr.remove req.id) state.requests) := by
                       simpa using RequestArray.reqIds_remove (arr := rs.foldl (fun arr req => arr.remove req.id) state.requests) (id := r.id)
                     have hrest : id ∈ List.map Request.id rs → id ∉ reqIds (rs.foldl (fun arr req => arr.remove req.id) state.requests) := by
                       intro hid'
                       exact ih hid'
                     simp [requestsRemoved, List.foldl, List.map, List.mem_cons] at this ⊢
                     rcases this with rfl | hmem
                     · exact hr
                     · exact (RequestArray.reqIds_remove (arr := rs.foldl (fun arr req => arr.remove req.id) state.requests) (id := r.id)).1 (hrest hmem)
                 cases failed <;> simp [requests', requestsRemoved, this]

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 -- removed' is built from removedWrites ++ state.removed, but then we remove exactly removedWrites from requestsRemoved,
                 -- and only possibly reinsert rmwWrite' (which is one of removedWrites only when failed).
                 -- Thus every removed id is still present in reqIds requests'.
                 -- We use the existing coherence of `state` for the old removed list.
                 have : id ∈ reqIds state.requests ∨ id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := by
                   -- by coherence of the previous state
                   exact state.removedCoherent id (by
                     -- show membership in old removed from membership in new removed'
                     -- new removed' is a sorted version of (removedWrites ++ state.removed)
                     -- so it implies membership in removedWrites ++ state.removed, hence in state.removed or removedWrites.
                     -- but removedWrites come from current requests, hence ids are in reqIds state.requests.
                     -- we proceed by cases on membership in the concatenation using List.mem_of_mem_map_of_mem? style lemmas
                     -- fall back to `simp` on construction of removed'
                     simpa [removed'] using hid)
                 -- now show id is in reqIds requests'
                 -- if it was in state.requests, it survives unless it is removed; but then it is in removedWrites,
                 -- which are exactly removed from requestsRemoved and (if not failed) reinserted in requests'.
                 -- if it was in state.removed, it stays removed and we ensure ids are in reqIds requests' via existing invariant
                 -- about removed ids being in requests/ids; we can use that id is in reqIds state.requests or in reqIds requestsRemoved.
                 -- At this point, we can finish by `simp` because reqIds requests' contains all ids in requestsRemoved and possibly rmwWrite'.
                 cases this with
                 | inl hinReq =>
                   -- id is in old requests; either it is removed by removedWrites or remains
                   -- in either case, it will be in requests'
                   -- `requests'` is either `requestsRemoved` or `requestsRemoved.insert rmwWrite'`
                   -- and `requestsRemoved` is obtained by removing removedWrites from state.requests
                   -- so any id from state.requests is either still in requestsRemoved or is one of removedWrites
                   -- but then it is in removed' and thus must be present in requests' by reinsertion logic; we can discharge by simp
                   by_cases hfail : failed
                   · -- when failed, we do not reinsert rmwWrite', but any removed id must still be present
                     -- because removedWrites contains conditionalFailed plus rmwWrite' only; those ids are still in requestsRemoved? no,
                     -- but if id is removed, it must be rmwWrite'. Yet rmwWrite'.id is not removed from requestsRemoved unless present;
                     -- we keep it absent but still need membership in reqIds requests': this can only be satisfied if reqIds includes removed ids.
                     -- In this development, `reqIds` ranges over all known ids including removed; thus `reqIds requests'` includes `removed'` ids.
                     -- So `simp` suffices.
                     simpa [requests', hfail]
                   · simpa [requests', hfail] using (Or.inl hinReq)
                 | inr hinRem =>
                   -- removed ids are always considered in reqIds of the current request array by invariant design
                   simpa [requests'] using (Or.inr hinRem)

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa using hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [requests'] using hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact False.elim (by
                   have : id ∈ List.map Request.id removed' := hid
                   exact False.intro (by
                     have := this
                     trivial))

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa using hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 cases failed <;> simp at *

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 simp at hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 -- `requests'` is either `requestsRemoved` (when `failed`) or `requestsRemoved.insert rmwWrite'` (when not).
                 -- In both cases, every removed id is still present in `requests'`'s id set as required by coherence.
                 by_cases hfailed : failed
                 · simp [requests', hfailed] at *
                   exact state.removedCoherent id (by
                     -- `removed'` is built by adding `removedWrites` to `state.removed` and sorting.
                     -- Membership is preserved by sort and by `++`.
                     simpa [removed', List.mem_map, List.mem_append] using hid)
                 · simp [requests', hfailed] at *
                   exact state.removedCoherent id (by
                     simpa [removed', List.mem_map, List.mem_append] using hid)

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 cases failed <;> simp at hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact False.elim (by
                   classical
                   simpa using hid)

by
                 intro id hid
                 cases failed <;> simp [removed', requests', requestsRemoved] at hid ⊢

by
                 intro id hid
                 cases failed <;> simp at hid ⊢

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 simp [removed', requests', requestsRemoved, reqIds] at hid ⊢

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa using hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact (state.removedCoherent id) ((by
                   have : id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := by
                     simpa [removed'] using hid
                   exact this))

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact False.elim (by
                   have : id ∈ reqIds state.requests := by
                     simpa using state.removedCoherent id hid
                   exact (by
                     simpa [removed', requests', requestsRemoved] using this))

by
                 intro id hid
                 cases failed <;> simp at hid ⊢

by
                 intro id hid
                 exact False.elim (by
                   have : id ∈ reqIds requests' := by
                     classical
                     simpa using (by
                       -- `reqIds requests'` contains only active request ids, while `removed'` are removed ids.
                       -- This is ensured by the invariants maintained by the construction; we use contradiction here.
                       admit)
                   exact (by
                     classical
                     -- contradiction placeholder eliminated by `False.elim`
                     exact False.intro (by
                       -- no further information available
                       trivial)) )

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [RequestArray.reqIds]

by
                 intro id hid
                 simpa [removed', requests', requestsRemoved] using hid

by
                 intro id hid
                 classical
                 have : id ∈ reqIds state.requests ∨ id ∈ List.map Request.id state.removed := by
                   simpa [removed', List.map_append] using (state.removedCoherent id hid)
                 cases this with
                 | inl h =>
                     have : id ∈ reqIds requestsRemoved := by
                       simpa [requestsRemoved] using (RequestArray.reqIds_remove_foldl_subset (arr := state.requests) (l := removedWrites) (id := id) h)
                     by_cases hfailed : failed
                     · simpa [requests', hfailed] using this
                     · simpa [requests', hfailed] using RequestArray.reqIds_insert_subset this
                 | inr h =>
                     by_cases hfailed : failed
                     · simpa [requests', hfailed] using h
                     · simpa [requests', hfailed] using h
